title: Nukes
body:
Nukes, a complete rewrite of my original [Nukes datapack](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/nukes-datapack/) with much, much bigger explosions, custom nuke texture visible when placed down, and enhanced sounds.

This pack also includes a Nuke Trader, which can be used to get a nuke for a cheaper price.

Have Fun :)

COMPATIBILITY:
  - 1.19.4-1.21.1! ANYTHING BELOW 1.19.4 IS **NOT** YET COMPATIBLE.
  - Cheats and mob griefing **MUST** be on. This is because mojang limits functions to running when they are enabled
